transcript.text:
[Tzuyang is here...?]
[Don't be so surprised yet]
[Daejeon's representative foods with 70 years of tradition!]
[But 10 servings...?]
[She can do it!]
[No she can't!]
[Who guessed it right?]
[You're the best...]
[A perfect weather to go for a walk]
Hello everyone
I'm at Daejeon today
Daejeon is known for their Kalguksu (knife-cut noodles) and their Duruchigi (spicy stir-fried pork)
I came to a very famous Kalguksu restaurant
I've been to this plaza before for Memil (buckwheat) noodles
Here Mijin
I came here 11 months ago

I'll be going to the 2nd floor for kalguksu
It says 60 years of tradition
But now it's close to 70 years
Let's go
[Daeseom Kalguksu] [Daejeon, Seo-gu]
Hello
[Today's menu]
We also specialize in Suyuk (boiled pork)
How about Osam Duruchigi? (Spicy stir-fried squid & pork)
The younger people really love it
It should be too much for 1 person
Big portions?
Suyuk comes in 2 servings
Duruchigi comes in 2~3 servings
Well then
1 Osam Duruchigi

With extra noodles
1 Kalguksu, 1 Bibim noodles (spicy thin noodles)
3 orders of Suyuk
You're eating all of that?
-1 small Suyuk -3 orders of Suyuk
-Suyuk? -Three
[What is she doing...?]
Do you want the bibim noodles cold or hot?
Cold, please
[We'll show you 70 years of tradition]
[Scoop up the noodles from the broth]
[Add lots of toppings]
[Cold bibim noodles as well!]
[Let's fire it up now]
[Pork belly]
[Fire show!]

[Add onions and squid]
[Osam Duruchigi] (Spicy stir-fried squid and pork)
[Next runner-up]
[Suyuk] (boiled pork)
[All ready to go]
That looks scrumptious!
Thank you
Extra noodles
[She can't finish everything...]
Of course she can
She'll leave leftovers
Is it tasty?
I came from Gwangju It's really good
I'm excited Thank you
I'll try the Suyuk first
Looks tender

I made Suyuk last night
That's good
Can't compare it to mine
It's seasoned really well
The fat-to-meat ratio is so perfect And it's really soft
Some radish kimchi on top
Other places serve cabbage kimchi But this place serves radish kimchi
[Getting more radish kimchi]
That's delicious
Some kalguksu broth now
Yum This is just what I like
Tasty
The noodles seem thinner
With Suyuk
That's so good
Even better together

With chives
Duruchigi
I have high expectations
It just looks so good
[Add the extra noodles on top]
You mix it up like this
Looks so good
Yummy
A little spicy
[Bibim noodles next]
They recommended to add radish kimchi in here
Let's give it a try
It tastes better because of the thicker noodles
I prefer thick noodles
The sauce is so good
Sweet & sour but it's seasoned perfectly

I thought I would need more sauce But it's perfect
This is just what I like
PD: It's on your hair
My hair? How?
You're right
Let's finish it up before the noodles get bloated
Tasty
Put the pork in
Pork noodles
Suyuk and kimchi
I like both of these
I usually prefer noodles with soup
But this Bibim guksu tastes really good
So this one takes it this time
But they're both great
Pork belly and squid

Daejeon is known for Kalguksu and Duruchigi
Daegu is known for Chinese cuisine and Makchang (abomasum)
And they live up to the hype
Suyuk just melts in my mouth And the pork belly in the duruchigi is chewy
So good
Duruchigi
With some Suyuk because it's spicy
Let's put them in here
Then I can enjoy them warm
PD: People on the blog were eating it with lettuce
[Lettuce...?]
I really saw it
PD nim just told me you're supposed to eat the noodles with lettuce...
[I don't believe you...]
You must've seen it wrong
This is weird

PD: Add pork
Add meat?
PD: They also put gochujang paste in the blog
[Doing as she is told]
[Will it be good..?]
It's good
But why?
It's good like this too
Delicious
Lettuce wraps are for meat only
How about these? Why do I keep putting noodles?
What am I doing?
Lettuce in noodles?
Wait
Why do I add noodles to the lettuce wrap?
[Multiple slices at a time]

[What is going on over there..?]
[Just having a meal]
How can she do that and stay skinny?
That's an order for a group of people
[No way]
Is that Tzuyang?
Then she's not eating much today
[But receiving a lot of love]
[I want a photo of her]
Together!
[My husband's a big fan]
It's spicy because of the chili peppers The seeds
Squid
It's really big
Squid on top like this
Suyuk and squid go well together

There's pork belly in here
But Suyuk is different because it's very soft and tender
Suyuk and bibim noodles
I come to Daejeon a lot for mukbangs
Mijin restaurant right downstairs
Oh and another place that I remember
Makchang soondae (blood pork sausage)
Conveyor belt sushi too My most viewed video
Abomasum KBBQ
Ramyun noodles from the rest area
[Daejeon lover]
This really tastes great
Would be great with alcohol
Lettuce
Garlic too
I want to wash this out in the soup

Thank you
I asked for soup because this is too spicy
It doesn't look bad
Spicy kalguksu?
I'm not playing with food It's just too spicy
They should sell it like this
It's good
Those are for me? Thank you!
Thank you
-Sorry to interrupt your meal -It's okay
Thank you for the drinks
I'm a fan
-Enjoy your meal! -You too
This really does taste good It's a spicy kalguksu
Almost tastes like jjamppong (spicy seafood noodles)
Probably because of the smokey flavor

I did this because it was too spicy But it's really delicious
This is way better than that noodle lettuce wrap
But nothing beats the original
She's so small
I'm just utterly shocked
[Us too]
[Did she starve for days?]
You finished all of that?!
Oh my...
Do you have a belly? Where's the food?
I have a bump
Crazy
I have dinner plans at 7
[Dinner...?]
This is humanly not possible
[And a few more people were surprised]

Thanks everyone~
[Thank you Daejeon citizens for treating me so well!] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
